pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh line 12 (rm -rf), export_result.sh line 9 (OUTPUT_DIR assignment), task.json line 5 (task description), task.json line 17 (metadata)
Code verification: export_result.sh lines 34, 40 (find *.jpg), verifier.py lines 60-61 (append .jpg to names), task.json line 5 (description example with .jpg)

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a camera reference library by saving JPEG snapshots from virtual test cameras in Nx Witness VMS. Output directory is /home/ga/Documents/ReferenceImages. Files are saved with .jpg extension and named using camera names with spaces replaced by underscores (e.g., Parking_Lot_Camera.jpg). The system uses 5 virtual test cameras (Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, Loading Dock Camera) created via testcamera tool with RTSP auto-discovery. VMS server runs at https://localhost:7001 with admin credentials (admin/Admin1234!). Task validates that all snapshots are valid JPEG files with timestamps after task start time.
